inputs.label: Numerator
inputs.businessContext: The value to be divided (the top of the fraction).

inputs.label: Denominator
inputs.businessContext: The value to divide by (the bottom of the fraction). Must not be zero.

inputs.label: Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier to apply to the ratio, e.g., 100 for percentage, 1 for raw ratio.

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding the final output.

formulas.roundedRatio: denominator !== 0 ? Math.round((numerator / denominator * multiplier) * Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces)) / Math.pow(10, decimalPlaces) : null
